# ER diagrams (this repo)

**Physical** and **logical** ERs are generated by **Graphviz** (not PlantUML):

- Per-service physical ER + heat: `make generate-diagrams` → `diagrams/physical/*.svg` and **`diagrams/data-modeling/png/physical-*.png`**
- Unified logical ER: **`diagrams/data-modeling/png/unified-logical-er.png`**

See root [`diagrams/README.md`](../README.md) and [`docs/architecture/er-index.md`](../../docs/architecture/er-index.md).
